reference: Sir, I had an accident four days ago. I fell off my motorcycle with a helmet, but somehow the helmet slipped off my head, and I have bruises under my right eye. My eye moves normally, but I have numbness under my eye, cheek, nose, and the right side of my upper lip and the front two upper teeth. So, I am asking how long this numbness will last, as my swelling has gone down.
text: Sir, I had an accident four days ago. I fell off my motorcycle with a helmet, but somehow the helmet slips off my head, and I have bruises under my right eye. My eye moves normally, but I have numbness under my eye, cheek, nose, and the right side of my upper lip, and the front two other teeth. So I am asking how long this numbness will last, as my swing has gone down.
